accommodation.name: The Palazzo at The Venetian
accommodation.address: 3325 S Las Vegas Blvd, Las Vegas, NV 89109
accommodation.description: Luxury all-suite hotel on the Strip - home base for the trip
accommodation.tips: Connected to Grand Canal Shoppes, Venetian, and multiple restaurants/bars.

places.name: The Palazzo at The Venetian
places.description: Luxury all-suite hotel on the Strip - home base for the trip
places.tips: Connected to Grand Canal Shoppes, Venetian, and multiple restaurants/bars.

places.name: Sumo Omakase
places.description: Intimate omakase experience - 2 appetizers, 16 nigiri, hand roll, miso, dessert for $99
places.tips: Off-strip (~15 min drive from Palazzo). Reservation at 7:30pm. BYOB not allowed. Great sake selection.

places.name: Close Company
places.description: Craft cocktail speakeasy by the legendary Death & Co team - serious cocktails in an intimate setting
places.tips: Inside Via Via Food Hall at the Venetian. No reservations needed. Try the rotating seasonal menu.

places.name: 1923 Prohibition Bar
places.description: 1920s prohibition-era speakeasy with dim lighting, plush seating, and expertly crafted cocktails
places.tips: Hidden in Grand Canal Shoppes. Cozy and dimly lit. Live entertainment Fri/Sat nights.

places.name: Dandelion Chocolate
places.description: Bean-to-bar craft chocolate maker with excellent coffee and hot chocolate
places.tips: Opens 7am. Great morning coffee spot right in the Venetian. Try the mission hot chocolate.

places.name: Bouchon Bistro
places.description: Thomas Keller French bistro - one of the best brunches in Vegas
places.tips: Try the steak & eggs or the quiche. Pastry basket is incredible. Reservations recommended.

places.name: Flight Club Las Vegas
places.description: Social darts experience with craft cocktails - competitive and fun group activity
places.tips: In the Venetian. Book an oche (dart board) in advance. Drinks and food at your board. Opens 11:30am.

places.name: Circa Resort & Casino
places.description: Downtown's newest resort with the world's largest sportsbook - Stadium Swim and massive screens
places.tips: About 15-20 min drive from the Strip. Stadium Swim is the multi-level pool amphitheater. Arrive by 2:30-3pm for Sweet 16 games.

places.name: Spearmint Rhino
places.description: The iconic Vegas gentlemen's club - open 24 hours
places.tips: 5 min from Palazzo on Highland Dr. Open 24hrs. Cover charge varies. Uber recommended.
